channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oxford physicists just made Schrödinger's cat even stranger
item.description: Oxford physicists have created a novel quantum state resembling Schrödinger's cat using highly quantum components.

item.title: Beneath our feet lies a fungal superhighway stretching 68 quadrillion miles
item.description: Scientists have mapped a vast hidden fungal network beneath Earth's surface that supports much of life on the planet.

item.title: Decades-old CO2 problem solved, fuel production tripled by scientists
item.description: A new catalyst design could greatly improve the conversion of CO2 into methanol, a key fuel and chemical. Researchers separated...

item.title: Dying star might birth a new universe instead of a black hole
item.description: What if some black holes are not black holes at all? A new theoretical study suggests that when a massive star collapses, it might not form a singulari...
